name: Mission Control Chat
description: Webchat channel plugin that connects Mission Control dashboard to OpenClaw agents

mcServerUrl.description: Base URL of the Next.js MC server that serves /api/chat/webhook (e.g. http://localhost:3000)

contextPackUrl.description: Base URL of the Next.js Mission Control API used for /api/chat/context-pack (e.g. http://localhost:3000)

sharedSecret.description: Shared secret for authenticating webhook callbacks between gateway and MC server

allowFrom.description: Portal tokens or admin tokens allowed to send messages

mc-chat.label: Mission Control Chat
mc-chat.description: Authenticated Mission Control webchat channel for OpenClaw agents.

mcServerUrl.label: MC Server URL
mcServerUrl.help: Trusted Mission Control origin used for callbacks and runtime tools.

contextPackUrl.label: Context Pack API URL
contextPackUrl.help: Trusted Mission Control origin used to load bounded turn context.

sharedSecret.label: Shared Secret
sharedSecret.help: Transport authentication only; run capabilities authorize tenant-scoped actions.
